channel.title: Kobo on pedro andrade
channel.description: Recent content in Kobo on pedro andrade

item.title: Kobo - Back It Up!
item.description: I’ve been a proud Kobo Aura H2O Edition 2 owner and user since 2017, and I couldn’t be happier. But a few days ago, I was importing a pdf file to calmly ready to my son, and allas trouble in paradise! The pdf file was somewhat corrupted, and while transferring to my device using Calibre, it borked and corrupted the internal database. It kept freezing a 6% and rebooted. It rendered unusable for transferring any other files. I could use it, but not to import new files.
